name: [rtdp] Host down
message: The rtdp host/agent is not reporting to Datadog. Notification-free for now — add a notification channel before enabling alerts.

name: [rtdp] /health failing
message: The /health endpoint check (instance:rtdp_health) is failing. Notification-free for now — add a notification channel before enabling alerts.

name: [rtdp] Elevated request latency (p95)
message: p95 latency for service:rtdp is elevated. Thresholds are provisional — observed p95 is ~0.3–1.5s, so revisit before enabling alerts. Notification-free for now — add a notification channel before enabling.
